app.name: Age of Abundance
app.label: App
app.description: One umbrella. Two futures. Your move.

meta.title: Age of Abundance
meta.description: One umbrella. Two futures. Your move.

subject.title: The future isn't coming. It's already being distributed.
subject.subtitle: Age of Abundance

content.body: Every sector. Every market. Every border. The tools exist right now to build a world of radical abundance — or to extract from it at scale. The only question is which side of that line you stand on.

subject.title: Two Futures Under One Agnostic Umbrella
subject.subtitle: The same technologies. Opposite outcomes.

content.body: We are platform-agnostic, ideology-agnostic, and border-agnostic. The Age of Abundance doesn't pick sides — it maps both.

highlights.subtitle: The Utopia Path
highlights.description: A future where decentralized tools, open infrastructure, and shared intelligence raise the floor for everyone. Abundance distributed. Barriers dissolved. Collective prosperity as the default state.

highlights.subtitle: The Extraction Path
highlights.description: A future where the same tools let adversaries pump and dump from anywhere at minuscule cost. Borderless exploitation. Synthetic manipulation at scale. Abundance hoarded by those who move fastest.

content.body: Each sector operates independently under the Age of Abundance umbrella — unified by shared infrastructure, separated by domain expertise.
